title: GitLab CI Pipeline Generation Flow
interaction_flow: generate-common.php → YAMLOutput: emit shared vars ($arch_targets, $php_versions_to_abi, targets)
generate-common.php → YAMLOutput: emit .services template (test-agent, request-replayer, httpbin, mysql, kafka, redis, etc.)
generate-appsec.php → YAMLOutput: emit $ecrLoginSnippet (AWS STS assume-role + ECR docker login)
generate-appsec.php → YAMLOutput: emit jobs: test appsec extension, appsec integration tests, push appsec images, helper-rust build/test/coverage, appsec code coverage
generate-tracer.php → generate-common.php: before_script_steps(with_docker_auth=true) calls dockerhub_login() then unset_dd_runner_env_vars()
generate-tracer.php → YAMLOutput: emit compile extension jobs (debug/nts/zts/asan), test jobs, integrations test jobs
generate-shared.php → YAMLOutput: foreach $all_minor_major_targets × $switch_php_versions emit ZAI tests, Extension Tea Tests
generate-shared.php → YAMLOutput: emit C components ASAN/UBSAN, Build & Test Tea, Configuration Consistency jobs
generate-profiler.php → YAMLOutput: emit profiling tests (foreach $profiler_minor_major_targets × arch × image variants), clippy NTS, Cargo test
generate-package.php → YAMLOutput: emit 'prepare code' job (composer install + make generate)
generate-package.php → YAMLOutput: foreach $build_platforms emit compile/package jobs per triplet
generate-package.php → generate-common.php: windows_git_setup_with_packages() [calls windows_git_setup() after preserving packages artifact]

shared_functions.unset_dd_runner_env_vars(): Emits shell steps to unset DD_SERVICE, DD_ENV, DD_TAGS, DD_TRACE_REMOVE_INTEGRATION_SERVICE_NAMES_ENABLED — removes Datadog runner auto-injection vars that pollute CI jobs
shared_functions.dockerhub_login(): Emits: 'if command -v docker > /dev/null 2>&1; then .gitlab/dockerhub-login.sh; fi' — conditionally authenticates to Docker Hub
shared_functions.windows_git_setup(): Emits PowerShell: kills leftover docker containers, cleans workspace via cmd /c rd, git clones with longpaths+symlinks, checks out CI_COMMIT_SHA, initializes submodules
shared_functions.windows_git_setup_with_packages(): Preserves packages/ dir to $TEMP before calling windows_git_setup(), then restores it
shared_functions.after_script($execute_dir, $has_test_age: [tracer only] Emits artifacts/after_script block; optionally runs check_test_agent.sh, always runs collect_artifacts.sh and silent-upload-junit-to-datadog.sh
shared_functions.before_script_steps($with_docker_auth): [tracer only] Conditionally calls dockerhub_login(), then unset_dd_runner_env_vars(), then switch-php, git safe.directory, mkdir for build dirs, moves compiled ddtrace.so

shared_data_from_generate_common.default_retry: max 2, when: unknown_failure, data_integrity_failure, runner_system_failure, scheduler_failure, api_failure, stuck_or_timeout_failure, job_execution_timeout

key_relationships: generate-tracer.php parses generate-common.php to extract .services names via regex
generate-common.php defines all shared functions and YAML anchors
important_notes: All generators are PHP scripts that output GitLab CI YAML to stdout. PHP template tags (<?php ?> and <?= ?>) mix logic with YAML text. Shared functions like unset_dd_runner_env_vars() and dockerhub_login() are defined once in generate-common.php and called inline within heredoc/mixed output. The ECR login in generate-appsec.php uses AWS STS assume-role with external-id 'ddbuild-dd-trace-php-ci' targeting account 669783387624. Docker Hub authentication delegates to .gitlab/dockerhub-login.sh script. generate-tracer.php also reads generate-common.php via file_get_contents + regex to dynamically enumerate service names.
